prompt_text:
### Demographics: 54-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.5 kg; Height 178.4 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 261mg/dL; 9 months ago 236mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 224mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.1kg; 9 months ago 75.8kg; 6 months ago 76.2kg; 3 months ago 74.8kg; current 80.5kg), Height (12 months ago 178.4cm; 9 months ago 178.4cm; 6 months ago 178.4cm; 3 months ago 178.4cm; current 178.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 70U/L; 6 months ago 64U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 66U/L), AST (12 months ago 44U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 516mg/g; 9 months ago 766mg/g; 6 months ago 820mg/g; 3 months ago 699mg/g; current 678mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 176mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
